features: EcoZone Forever Flush Blue Toilet Blocks: Twin pack of eco-friendly toilet blocks. 3-in-1 perfumed cleaner, sanitiser and de-scaler, keeps toilet bowls at their best and your bathroom smelling fresh
In cistern device: Encased in a fully recyclable exterior, the block is designed to gradually releases the cleaning solution inside with every flush, hygienically cleansing and sanitising your loo
Cruelty free, gentle and vegan friendly formula: Approved by PETA and not tested on animals. Contains no animal products. Approved by Allergy UK to be allergy friendly and safe for sensitive skin
Safe for home septic tanks and aquatic life: Biodegradable and natural solution. Easy to use - place one block into the cistern and let it work its magic after every use, with up to 2000 flushes
A smart green clean with EcoZone: Created by families for families. Environmentally friendly cleaning products that work, inspired by plant-based, natural ingredients with no nasty hidden chemicals
description: Product Description EcoZone Forever Flush Twin Pack Toilet Blocks offers an innovative and eco-friendly alternative to toilet rim hangers, that instead sits discretely in your toilet cistern for up to 5 months. Encased in a fully recyclable exterior, each block is designed in a way that it gradually releases the solution inside when its penetrated with water. Once you flush, the sanitised water automatically filters into the toilet bowl, cleansing, refreshing and descaling your toilet all together. The easy to use solution helps to cleanse, de-odourise and de-scale your toilet bowl every day, helping to keep your bathroom looking clean and smelling fresh. Safe for use with septic tanks. It is advised to use your toilet brush to maintain a thoroughly clean surface and bowl as often as needed. • Twin pack of 2 x EcoZone Forever Flush Toilet Blocks • Cleans, sanitises & descales toilet bowl on every flush • Strong & powerful yet gentle on skin & environment • Eco friendly plant-based formula, inspired by natural ingredients • Can safely be used in households with pets & children, however, we strongly advise you to store this item out of their sight & reach Ingredients Sodium Sulphate Anhydrous, Sodium Hydroxide, Coco Alkyl Diethanolamides, Water. Directions Start with a clean toilet bowl. Flush the toilet. Place the jar inside the cistern. To remove, turn the jar upside down and drain, then place in a bag for disposal. Safety Warning Danger contains sodium hydroxide causes serious eye irritation. Causes skin irritation. Keep out of reach of children. If on skin: wash with plenty of soap and water. If in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists: get medical advice/attention. Box Contains 2 x Forever Flush 2000 See more
